Localization.Description: A user added or removed a host from the Device Monitor security scheme, or a user included or excluded a host from a computer group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added the host "{object.name}" to the Device Monitor security scheme on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} included the host "{object.value}" to the computer group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} excluded the host "{object.value}" from the computer group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the host "{object.name}" from the Device Monitor security scheme on host {event_src.host}
